title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay · Language Clinic: Idempotent Resume
summary: Mutable session blobs overwrite history, checkpoints split state from effects, resume repeats a tool call, and a debugging replay contacts production services. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the idempotent resume increment in append-only replayable agent session. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Reconcile in-progress and uncertain effects before continuation using idempotency keys, receipts, status queries, or human review.
Commit state, pending calls, completed effects, budgets, approvals, and provider references atomically with version checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-idempotent-resume — Reconcile in-progress and uncertain effects before continuation using idempotency keys, receipts, status queries, or human review.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_session_checkpoint_replay_3(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"

# Evidence: agentpy-idempotent-resume-mz44b6
# Competency: agentpy-idempotent-resume.
# Case 7134: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.

def evidence_agentpy_idempotent_resume_mz44b6(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "interaction7134",
        "tool6b44zm",
        "statemz44b67134",
        "evaluation7134mz44b6",

content.text: A theory agent engineering team handles case 8954 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to persist append-only session events and atomic checkpoints that support idempotent resume, fork, replay, and effect reconciliation; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.
